Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log with three cases C001 C002 C003 We notice that the same activity names appear multiple times within the same case and across cases The activities that are repeated and need disambiguation are Verify Documents Call Customer and Adjust Account

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The problem says the same activity names appear multiple times within a single case so we are focusing on multiple occurrences in the same case

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For Verify Documents we can have a pattern The first verification in a case is Initial Document Verification Any subsequent verifications in the same case are named with increasing numbers or by purpose

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can standardize by the position first second and the role Or by the context

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The context in C001 for the second verification says agent re checks documents now that ID scan is provided and in C003 re verify docs after account adjustment so we can use these clues to rename them by reason

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Correction In C002 there is only one Verify Documents

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: For Call Customer In C001 the purpose is request missing documents In C002 the first call is to clarify account discrepancy and the second is to confirm adjustments In C003 the purpose is to have the customer return

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We decide to use the purpose as in the context so C001 Call for Missing Documents C002 Call for Clarification and Call for Confirmation C003 Recall Customer Call

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Adjust Account appears only once per case so we might not need to rename it because the task is about activities that appear multiple times within the same case

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: If we change the first in C001 and C003 to Initial Document Verification then in C002 we have one that is the initial and is named Verify Documents which might be confusing when comparing cases

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: To be safe we will only change the activities that are repeated within the same case For activities that appear only once in a case we leave the name as is

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Therefore we do In C001 two Verify Documents so we change both In C002 two Call Customer so we change both In C003 two Verify Documents so we change both

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Verify Documents Every first occurrence in a case Initial Document Verification Every second occurrence in a case Document Reverification Additional Docs or Document Reverification After Adjustment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Call Customer In C002 First Call for Clarification Second Call for Confirmation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Call Customer in C001 and C003 remain unchanged because they occur only once in their respective cases and do not require disambiguation within the case Similarly the Verify Documents in C002 remains unchanged because it occurs only once in that case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This revised log now has disambiguated activity names for the activities that were repeated within the same case
